_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Define and/or implement policies and procedures to ensure protection of critical infrastructure as appropriate.
reference_document_element_description: Provision, configure, and maintain the data platform infrastructure, including compute environments, storage systems, networking, and security controls.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-015 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-009 (SP, cosine: 0.496), RC-K-010 (RC, cosine: 0.494).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.552). Shared vocabulary: [infrastructure]. DCWF-only terms [appropriate, critical, define, ensure, implement, policies] vs WIDAI-only terms [compute, configure, controls, data, environments, maintain] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.870 (P=0.867, R=0.872). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (94.5%). The model interprets "Define and/or implement policies and procedures to ensure protection of critical" as logically implying aspects of "Provision, configure, and maintain the data platform infrastructure, including c" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Intersects with' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.499 < STS 0.552 (gap -0.053). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [appropriate, critical, define] and [compute, configure, controls] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.1%. Shared tokens: [infrastructure]. DCWF-only: [appropriate, critical, define, ensure, implement, policies]. WIDAI-only: [compute, configure, controls, data, environments, maintain].
